content.text:
Looking at the image, the track ahead is a long straight running to the right, with the car positioned near the left edge (white line visible on the left, yellow dashed center line visible to the right), needing to move right toward center.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 117, target = (117 + 5) % 120 = 2
- Waypoint 2: x=3.3593, y=0.6834
- Car: x=2.8981, y=0.9327
- Bearing = atan2(0.6834 - 0.9327, 3.3593 - 2.8981) = atan2(-0.2493, 0.4612) = -28.3°
- Current heading: 11.29°
- Delta = -28.3° - 11.29° = -39.6° → right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is still near the left edge with delta of -39.6° requiring right correction; applying -20° steering at speed 1.0 to bring car back toward the track center line.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track is a long straight running east at y≈0.68 for most of the lap",
    "Car consistently drifts left of center — needs sustained right corrections on the straight",
    "Positive delta = steer left (positive steering_angle), negative = steer right",
    "At delta < 5°, use steering_angle=0 at speed 1.5 to avoid oscillation",
    "Car is ~0.25m left of center — near left edge, needs continued right correction",
    "Oversteer warning: once delta drops below 5°, use steering_angle=0 immediately",
    "Track curves right (south) around waypoints 24-30",
    "Delta of ~-40° requires -20° steering at speed 1.0",
    "Car x is slowly increasing (2.52→2.61→2.70→2.81→2.90) showing right correction is working",
    "White line visible on left in image confirms car is near left boundary"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.613, 2.704, 2.809, 2.898],
    "y": [0.876, 0.905, 0.928, 0.933],
    "yaw": [15.0, 15.8, 14.8, 11.3]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -39.6,
  "speed": 1.0,
  "steering_angle": -20.0
}
```
